title: schoenanthus
intro: Schoenanthus, also known as Egyptian chamomile or white wormwood, is a plant species that belongs to the family Asteraceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to treat digestive issues, fever, and rheumatism due to its antispasmodic, anti-inflammatory, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Schoenanthus include reducing anxiety and stress, improving sleep quality, and aiding in the treatment of respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Schoenanthus can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are commonly used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
